titleStmt.title: Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 592

p.seg: William, by the grace of God king of the Scots, to all worthy men of his entire land, clerk and lay, greeting.

Let present and future know me to have approved, and by this my charter to have made firm, the donation which David of Quixwood made to the hospital of Old Cambus and the lepers dwelling there of the half ploughgate of land in Old Cambus which Ralph the tanner held. To be held in free, pure, and perpetual alms, with all liberties and easements pertaining to the said land, as freely and quitly as the charter of the said David bears witness. Saving my service.
As witnesses: William del Bois, my chancellor; Walter of Lindsay; John of Maxwell; Walter Comyn; David of Hastings.
At Jedburgh on the 16th day of May.
